description: User waits on the flight search loading screen while airfares are being retrieved for a Brisbane to London return trip.
frame_description: A loading screen is displayed with a red plane animation looping between Brisbane and London markers, accompanied by the text 'Available airfares will be displayed shortly'.

description: Continuous loading animation of a red plane flying between origin and destination points.
frame_description: The animated plane moves along a dashed path between Brisbane and London.
